message:
refactor(_stat_mod): Add modeCheck() factory for type test functions

Add h.modeCheck() factory to mod_helper.zig for stat mode type checks.
Replaces 7 nearly-identical functions (S_ISDIR, S_ISCHR, S_ISBLK, etc.)
with factory pattern: h.modeCheck("0o040000").

Reduces _stat_mod.zig from 172 to 101 lines (-71 lines).
